coverage: All five authored input sweeps execute with exact vertex and face counts and local bounds within 0.0001 units of Blender.
validation: Split Edges processes mesh components inside instances, matching Blender autosmooth topology. Curve Tangent now consumes Resample Curve's evaluated normalized-segment-bisector frame instead of rebuilding a length-weighted chord; the 39 pre-twist instance transforms match Blender within 0.000086 units.

groups.surface: roughness 2/15 mace ball and zero-roughness polished chain

materialParity.evidence: The exact soup contains an 18,620-triangle chrome.002 range and a 206,528-triangle null range. Blender's realized mesh has slots [chrome.002, null], assigns all 214,718 faces to slot zero, and carries rough=2 on the 9,310 mace faces while the joined chain resolves it to zero. The authored Mapping output drives Noise Scale while Noise Vector stays zero, so Blender produces a constant mapped value of 1/15 rather than spatial grain; the browser reproduces roughness 2/15 on the mace and zero on the chain. A deterministic capture-only RectArea rig lowers aligned luminance MAE from 0.5178 to 0.2069 and binary disagreement from 80.6% to 9.0%. The missing Blender studio reflection pattern still prevents shader parity: correlation remains negative even though lighting magnitude is much closer.
